org.apache.flink.api.connector.sink

## Interface SinkWriter<InputT,CommT,WriterStateT>

  * Type Parameters:
    `InputT` \- The type of the sink writer's input
    `CommT` \- The type of information needed to commit data staged by the sink
    `WriterStateT` \- The type of the writer's state

All Superinterfaces:
    [AutoCloseable](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/AutoCloseable.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")

All Known Implementing Classes:
    [FileWriter](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/connector/file/sink/writer/FileWriter.html> "class in org.apache.flink.connector.file.sink.writer")

* * *




        [@Experimental](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/annotation/Experimental.html> "annotation in org.apache.flink.annotation")
        public interface SinkWriter<InputT,CommT,WriterStateT>
        extends [AutoCloseable](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/AutoCloseable.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")

The `SinkWriter` is responsible for writing data and handling any potential tmp area used to write yet un-staged data, e.g. in-progress files. The data (or metadata pointing to where the actual data is staged) ready to commit is returned to the system by the [`prepareCommit(boolean)`](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/connector/sink/SinkWriter.html#prepareCommit-boolean->).

  *     * ### Method Detail

      * #### write

            void write([InputT](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/connector/sink/SinkWriter.html> "type parameter in SinkWriter") element,
                       [SinkWriter.Context](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/connector/sink/SinkWriter.Context.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.api.connector.sink") context)
                throws [IOException](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/io/IOException.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.io")

Add an element to the writer.

Parameters:
    `element` \- The input record
    `context` \- The additional information about the input record
Throws:
    `[IOException](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/io/IOException.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.io")` \- if fail to add an element.
      * #### prepareCommit

            [List](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/util/List.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.util")<[CommT](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/connector/sink/SinkWriter.html> "type parameter in SinkWriter")> prepareCommit(boolean flush)
                               throws [IOException](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/io/IOException.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.io")

Prepare for a commit.

This will be called before we checkpoint the Writer's state in Streaming execution mode.

Parameters:
    `flush` \- Whether flushing the un-staged data or not
Returns:
    The data is ready to commit.
Throws:
    `[IOException](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/io/IOException.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.io")` \- if fail to prepare for a commit.

            [List](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/util/List.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.util")<[WriterStateT](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/connector/sink/SinkWriter.html> "type parameter in SinkWriter")> snapshotState()
                                      throws [IOException](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/io/IOException.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.io")

Returns:
    The writer's state.
Throws:
    `[IOException](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/io/IOException.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.io")` \- if fail to snapshot writer's state.
